title: My in depth review of New Super Mario Bros Wii
description:
Seriously, buy this game.
If you like Mario, you will buy this game.
If you don't like Mario, you will STILL buy this game.

It's fucking amazing, it's like SMB, SMB3, SMW and SMW2 mixed together into what can only be described as a game-gasm. I was literally shouting yes as I was playing it, it's that fucking amazing.

It's better than whatever shit you're playing now, stop playing that COD repackaged game with slightly updated graphics bullshit you're playing now and go out and BUY THIS FUCKING GAME.

I don't care if you don't own a Wii, go out and buy one and get this game. 

I don't care if you hate everything Nintendo, write Sony over the brand and buy it.

I don't care if you're poor as shit, sell your computer and buy a Wii and this game. (But make sure and go to the library to watch my videos, k?)

IT'S FUCKING GREAT.

I haven't liked a game this much since I first played SMW years ago. It's better than SSBB, SMG and every single game made by VALVe combined. And coming from me that's fucking saying something, for me to say it's better than Half-life 2.



WHAT THE FUCK ARE YOU STILL READING THIS FOR?? FUCKING BUY IT.

NOW!!!
